title: Why is Shinji given such a hard time
display_title: Why is Shinji given such a hard time
wikitext:
[]: Why is Shinji given such a hard time?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:29 pm This has been nagging at me for a while. Shinji disobeyed orders, yes, but he killed Shamshel and saved everyone. Asuka pulls the same stunt when they fight Israfel, but they both get yelled at when it was all her fault to begin with. Then there was the Bardiel disaster, which was Gendo's fault for not sending all three Evangelions simultaneously instead of making Bardiel "run the gauntlet". Meanwhile, Asuka gets away with goading Shinji into doing something stupid and getting eaten by Leliel.... Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:43 pm You don't follow orders, you get yelled at. I thought it was all justified, tbh.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:45 pm No, if you don't follow orders and you ruin things, you get yelled at. Shinji wins, and he gets yelled at for it. That just seems wrong to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:00 pm Because Asuka was actually folowing orders againts Israfel it was Misato the one who screw it up, Gendo wasn't at fault he gave orders Shinji refuse to do it, and Asuka taunt Shinji to go but Shinji was the one disobeying you can't take his fault just because "Asuka told me to do it, I'll prove her I'm a man".

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:03 pm ^That, and the Shamshel move could've easily backfired. The Angel could've "outlived" EVA-01. Shinji didn't "save everyone" in this episode; he endangered everyone needlessly. Shinji hardly planned his move, and nothing indicates he wouldn't have saved everyone as well had he followed Misato's order to retreat.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:17 pm CyberXIII wrote: No, if you don't follow orders and you ruin things, you get yelled at.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:25 pm I think Rock-Slash was referring to the anime all along. This part of his post refers to the fight against Israfel: Rock-Slash wrote: Because Asuka was actually folowing orders againts Israfel it was Misato the one who screw it up

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:25 pm True, but I don't know if I'd call NERV a traditional military structure, beyond Misato's rank and attitude. They really only have three soldiers, anyway. And the Shamshel fight was a disaster from the beginning. What was the boy shooting, smoke grenades?

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:27 pm I was talking about Gendo giving the orders in the Bardiel fight, he gave them and Shinji refuse them. Asuka was following orders againts Israfel, someone take turn to attack while the other one cover, and she did that, Misato was the one who didn't come with an strategy after Israfel separate in two, Ritsuko explicitlysaid that Gendo would have fired her if he was in HQ at the moment, and Im not talking about the manga EDIT: At least DIDDY got what I mean sorry I need to polish my english.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:28 pm CyberXIII wrote: True, but I don't know if I'd call NERV a traditional military structure, beyond Misato's rank and attitude.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:29 pm Rock-Slash wrote: Im not talking about the manga

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:30 pm Yes, Gendo gave the orders, but I'm saying they were flawed to begin with. He should have sent the Eva's out simultaneously.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Wed Oct 21, 2009 10:31 pm Shinji apparently has an inner ear infection throughout the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Wed Oct 21, 2009 11:02 pm CyberXIII wrote: Yes, Gendo gave the orders, but I'm saying they were flawed to begin with. He should have sent the Eva's out simultaneously.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Oct 21, 2009 11:52 pm DIDDY wrote: I think Rock-Slash was referring to the anime all along.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Thu Oct 22, 2009 12:13 am Alaska Slim wrote: Unit-00 was attacked first, only Unit-01 was left after Asuka was taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Oct 22, 2009 12:32 am Rock-Slash wrote: Alaska Slim wrote: Unit-00 was attacked first, only Unit-01 was left after Asuka was taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Oct 22, 2009 12:40 am Alaska Slim wrote: CyberXIII wrote: They really only have three soldiers, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Thu Oct 22, 2009 12:42 am NERV security count as soldiers, and the other NERV personal are trained to fire a gun.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Oct 22, 2009 1:01 am esselfortium wrote: Alaska Slim wrote: CyberXIII wrote: They really only have three soldiers, anyway.

Article: Why is Shinji given such a hard time
[]: Why is Shinji given such a hard time?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:29 pm This has been nagging at me for a while. Shinji disobeyed orders, yes, but he killed Shamshel and saved everyone. Asuka pulls the same stunt when they fight Israfel, but they both get yelled at when it was all her fault to begin with. Then there was the Bardiel disaster, which was Gendo's fault for not sending all three Evangelions simultaneously instead of making Bardiel "run the gauntlet". Meanwhile, Asuka gets away with goading Shinji into doing something stupid and getting eaten by Leliel.... Thoughts?
